steps.description: Click the "Custom Engine Agent" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code. This selects the agent type described as "Build intelligent agent where you manage orchestration and provide your own LLM."
Click the "Weather Agent" dropdown option in the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" dialog in Visual Studio Code.
Click on "JavaScript" in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Default folder /home/node/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the "Workspace Folder" selection dialog in Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Forecast the weather tomorrow" option card in the chat interface under the "vscuse_app_KXyFGlocal" conversation within the M365 Copilot application.
Click the "Forecast the weather tomorrow" suggestion button displayed below the chat input box within the M365 Copilot conversation interface.
